name: T-Hanbaisha (DDE)
description:
"I'm Hanbaisha! But for simplicity sake and for your lovely invitation to build a friendship, call me T!"

How long has been since i dropped? A while? Yea...

One of the best characters in DDE, so much effort put into this fella!

Pretty much, you go into a corner store, where you encounter this guy.

In the intro, Hanbaisha is in their feminine form, because they forgot how to turn back to their masculine form, but if you remind them, they could turn into their masculine form no problem!

Feedback appreciated!

(Some info are my headcannons, there's not much info about this fella)

Character by: Boxyyyy_ and SunnyJay

Mod: Dimensional Deep End
creator: Casosteamy
